ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) submitted a clarification to stock exchanges correcting a minor typographical error in the date of a recent media release concerning the 'AdaniDioxycle Partnership to Advance Low-Carbon Chemical Manufacturing'. The original release inadvertently stated the date as July 9th instead of July 10th, 2026. This correction is administrative in nature, with AEL explicitly stating all other contents and material aspects of the announcement remain unchanged, indicating no financial or operational impact or red flags.
